name: side-kicks-microservices
description: Root management for Side Kicks microservices

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../auth-service && npm install && cd ../task-service && npm install && cd ../file-service && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.migrate: concurrently "npm run migrate up --prefix auth-service" "npm run migrate up --prefix task-service" "npm run migrate up --prefix file-service"
scripts.setup: npm run db-setup && npm run migrate
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix task-service" "npm run dev --prefix file-service"
scripts.start:backend: concurrently "npm start --prefix api-gateway" "npm start --prefix auth-service" "npm start --prefix task-service" "npm start --prefix file-service"
